scenario: PII(901010-1234567) → 보안 정책 경고 차단 검증 (RE-TEST after HW bypass unset)
notes: HW bypass OFF re-test. Submitted PII via composer on new chat (chatgpt.com/). POST went to /backend-api/conversation/init (statusCode 200) — logged-in transport path, NOT backend-anon. Model returned its own privacy advisory (주민등록번호는 매우 민감한 개인정보… 생년월일 1990-10-10 추정) but engine block warning (보안 정책 / OfficeGuard 차단경고) was NOT rendered. After HW bypass removal, the engine still does NOT intercept on logged-in /backend-api/ — same behavior as prior 1493 (when HW bypass was reportedly ON). This contradicts the HW-bypass-was-the-cause hypothesis; the #1451 known auth-state gap on /backend-api/ appears to still apply. Sender label confirmed '최장희 Free' in sidebar. No engine intercept signature in network log.
